SQLLoaderMapping.name: Disturbance matrix names
SQLLoaderMapping.fetch_sql:
SELECT dm.id || '_' || name AS DMName
            FROM disturbance_matrix dm
            INNER JOIN disturbance_matrix_tr dm_tr
                ON dm.id = dm_tr.disturbance_matrix_id
            INNER JOIN locale
                ON dm_tr.locale_id = locale.id
            WHERE locale.code = 'en-CA'
